allow: Bash(node -e "const html = require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('dist/skills/communication/index.html','utf8'\); const m = html.match\(/<h1[\\s\\S]*?<\\/h1>/\); console.log\(m ? m[0].replace\(/\\s+/g,' '\).slice\(0,300\) : 'NONE'\);")

Bash(node -e "const html = require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('dist/index.html','utf8'\); ['/skills/communication','/skills/leadership','/skills/creativity','/skills/technology','/skills/problem-solving'].forEach\(p => console.log\(p, '→', html.includes\(p\) ? 'present in HTML' : 'MISSING'\)\);")
